slots.name: text_0
slots.defaultValue: A timeless icon of mid-century modern design, the lounge chair represents the pinnacle of comfort and aesthetic refinement. Designed with meticulous attention to every curve and proportion.

slots.name: text_1
slots.defaultValue: Premium materials selected for both beauty and durability. Molded plywood shells paired with supple leather cushions create an experience that improves with age.
